title: Zoni's Anime Weapons
description: This mod adds weapons from SAO, Genshin Impact, Fate Series and much more.
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This is my very first mod.
This mod is highly influenced by Heroic Armory and Loot Bags, and it aims to add lots of new loot to make exploring more fun, since there is a lot of weapons it can also be used for RPG modpacks and servers.

Make best use out of it and enjoy.



Curios Mod Required
As of update 3.0, Genshin Impact Artifacts were added, so the Curios API is required to play the mod, you can find it here.



Better Combat Mod Compatibility
After version 3.9.3 the mod is fully compatible with Better Combat!



Ascended Weapons
Ascended Weapons can be crafted combining ANY weapon with an Ascending Crystal in a Smithing Table. 
Every Ascended Weapon in the same category share atk and spd, so that you can use you favorite weapons without feeling that you could do more dmg with another one.



Right now the mod has:
- 2 New Ores

- 3 New Crops

- 240+ New Weapons All With Ascended Forms

- 7 New Armor Sets

- 34 Genshin Artifact Sets

- 3 SAO Crystals

- 6 New Structures

- 4 New Enemies

- 5 New NPC

- 20+ New Foods

- Construction Blocks

- Vanilla+ Features

Gameplay:
The new weapons can be obtained from the LootBags that drop randomly from mobs (Shift+RightClick to open them) or can be bought from the Weapon Dealer for a Weapon Base.

The Genshin Impact Artifacts give you buffs when equipped in the respective Curios slots. You will need at least 2 pieces of the same set to get a buff, 4 pieces of the same set may increase the power of the effect in some cases.

The new seeds can be obtained by breaking grass.

Iolite can be mined bellow 32 world height.



Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/LVbsCpdXNDc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Commands
You can change if Loot Bags spawn or not with the gamerule doLootBagsSpawn.



Known Issues:
If you're getting the "invalid player data" error try installing Packet Fixer.



If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG

Disclaimer: Even tho I made this mod I only own the rights to some of the textures used.
